fix.item: Fixed mobile view not displaying values for members and students.
Fixed minor bugs.
Minor bug fixes.
Added a lesson overview for teachers.
Added the first part of attendance tracking.
Changed the extension from a component-only install to a package install.
Added attendance tracking with updates for existing records.
Added an attendance history graph for lessons.
Added waiting lists for lessons that are full.
Fixed subscription end dates not being taken into account.
Added technical fixes only.
Fixed an error when there are no lessons open for subscription.
Added holiday management.
Switched the build process to Joomla Builder 2.
Added support for searching lessons from previous years.

change.item: Lesson age restrictions are now year based instead of date based: a min_age/max_age lesson admits everyone who reaches that age during the calendar year of the lesson, matching school grades.

fix.item: Fixed "Duplicate column name" error that could abort the update: the 1.3.2 repair script no longer re-adds columns that 1.2.12.sql and 1.2.20.sql already create.

Fixed a fatal TypeError ("Argument #1 ($value) must be of type object|array, false given") when registering a new student: the student form no longer passes a denied/empty record to the data preparation event.
Fixed member registration so invalid form data no longer creates Joomla users and validated data is used consistently.
Hardened lesson subscriptions with server-side checks for open registration periods, non-trashed lessons, duplicate subscriptions, and clearer API error messages.
Fixed student detail status so it is based on actual subscriptions in non-trashed lessons instead of the stored student state.
Added a configurable school year offset, defaulting to six months.
Fixed Joomla update metadata so package updates match the installed package identity.
Fixed the subscriptions year filter so "All school years" keeps the year filter empty and shows subscriptions across all years.
Subscriptions year filter defaults to the latest school year.
Fixed min() crash when viewing attendance for lessons that haven't started yet.
Added Teachers tab to lesson detail (frontend) and lesson edit (backend) with add/remove.
Added student filter to subscriptions list.
Linked student names in subscriptions to their detail page and vice versa.
Non-primary parents can no longer edit student data via URL manipulation.
Added year filter to backend lessons overview.
Added waiting list count to lessons overview.
Removed "Not yet implemented" placeholder from lessons page.
Fixed unsubscribe failing for primary parents when model instantiation failed in API context.
Fixed unsubscribe showing "Failed" error even though the subscription was successfully deleted. The API now returns a proper HTTP 204 response.
Fixed registration activation email not being sent on the site member register form. Accounts were created but users saw an error and did not receive the activation link.

change.item: Updated frontend action labels so the student and subscription create buttons use clearer, context-specific text.

fix.item: Fixed member registration not saving address and contact details to the members_additional table, which left new accounts missing from the member overview.
Aligned Angular member SPA dependencies so cloud and local npm installs no longer fail with peer dependency conflicts.
